case_title: GENERAL MOTORS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION VS. ELIZABETH M BOLANTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CAROL MENIGHINI FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERAL MOTORS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION
